+ Add creates the task (rendered in #taskList with due-date pill).
Per-task checkbox toggles + persists (done=true survived reload; strikethrough rendered).

NEW-D22: per-task DELETE (×, data-tk-action=removeTask) is a no-op AND freezes the renderer — real + synthetic clicks both left the task present across reloads; yet a direct deleteDoc(leads/{id}/tasks/{tid}) succeeds (rules allow it, used to clean up). So the removeTask UI handler is broken (its deleteDoc/loadTasks path hangs and never removes), while the underlying delete works.
Native confirm OK exercised repeatedly (stage-move 'Move to Contacted' OK -> contacted; report-delete OK).
Native confirm Cancel exercised (Enrich Data cancel; bulk-delete cancel; stage-move cancel).

Toast Undo/Retry uses the same data-ui-action delegate as closeToast (proven by 018); the undo callback is caller-specific. Delegate verified.
Toast ✕ close (data-ui-action=closeToast) dismisses the toast (verified via a ZZ_QA test toast).
Home widget ✕ remove (data-w-action=removeWidget) removes the widget from nbd_home_widgets + DOM (tested on quote-widget; restored layout).
Snooze toast intentionally has no Undo (informational); snooze itself verified PASS in d3-pipeline.
